name: Ginger Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Butter and flour a 9-inch by 2-inch round cake pan.
3. Sift together the dry ingredients in a bowl.
4. In a small saucepan, melt the butter, then add molasses and brown sugar. Let cool.
5. When the butter mixture is cooled, stir it into the dry ingredients and mix thoroughly.
6. Add buttermilk, orange juice, and eggs. Mix until combined.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared cake pan.
8. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until well done.
